ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Detect the language of the recipe so the sections are in the same language as the rest of your notes
ast.target: 检测食谱语言，以便各部分与笔记其余部分使用相同语言

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show images in the recipe (see https://cooklang.org/docs/spec/#adding-pictures)
ast.target: 在食谱中显示图片（参见 https://cooklang.org/docs/spec/#adding-pictures）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the list of ingredients at the top of the recipe
ast.target: 在食谱顶部显示食材列表

ast.name: setDesc

ast.target: 在食谱顶部显示厨具列表

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the ingredient quantities inline in the recipe method
ast.target: 在食谱步骤中内联显示食材用量

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show the ingredient quantities as fractions instead of decimals, if possible
ast.target: 如果可能，将食材用量显示为分数而非小数

ast.name: setName

ast.target: 自动查找食谱语言

ast.name: warn
ast.source: accessing an object - but returnObjects options is not enabled!
ast.target: 正在访问一个对象 - 但未启用 returnObjects 选项！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Seems the loaded translations were in flat JSON format instead of nested. Either set keySeparator: false on init or make sure your translations are published in nested format.
ast.target: 似乎加载的翻译是扁平 JSON 格式而非嵌套格式。请在初始化时设置 keySeparator: false，或确保您的翻译以嵌套格式发布。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: This means something IS WRONG in your setup. You access the t function before i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage was done. Wait for the callback or Promise to resolve before accessing it!!!
ast.target: 这意味着您的设置中存在错误。您在 i18next.init / i18next.loadNamespace / i18next.changeLanguage 完成之前就访问了 t 函数。请等待回调或 Promise 解析后再访问它！！！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No backend was added via i18next.use. Will not load resources.
ast.target: 未通过 i18next.use 添加后端。将不会加载资源。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: no languageDetector is used and no lng is defined
ast.target: 初始化：未使用语言检测器且未定义 lng

ast.name: warn
ast.source: init: i18next is already initialized. You should call init just once!
ast.target: 初始化：i18next 已经初始化。您应该只调用一次 init！

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18next was not initialized
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace：i18next 尚未初始化

ast.name: warn
ast.source: hasLoadedNamespace: i18n.languages were undefined or empty
ast.target: hasLoadedNamespace：i18n.languages 未定义或为空

ast.name: warn
ast.source: RangePips: You are trying to render too many pips. This will cause performance issues. Try increasing the "pipstep" prop to reduce the number of pips shown.
ast.target: RangePips：您尝试渲染过多的刻度点。这将导致性能问题。尝试增加 \"pipstep\" 属性以减少显示的刻度点数量。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: 'ariaLabels' prop should be an Array
ast.target: 'ariaLabels' 属性应该是一个数组
